documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 5 implements the harness loop: @tesseract/persona (parse/emit/validate Anthropic 16-field, .cursor/agents mirror, .mdc shim, with a tech-writer round-trip test), @tesseract/pipeline (YAML loader, executePipeline, compilePipeline structural stub), and @tesseract/runner-cursor (CursorRunner producing a structured invocation envelope without an LLM call). Adds the yaml catalog dep and updates the three feature task lists.

deferred_items.rationale: LangGraph.js StateGraph runtime backend is intentionally not pulled in; this slice ships an ordered in-process executor and a structural compile stub. Tracked for a later integration slice.
Round-trip parity is semantic (deep-equal on parsed frontmatter and body) rather than byte-for-byte; YAML key order is intentionally not normalized in this slice.
Real LLM invocation is intentionally deferred. The runner returns a structured envelope so downstream packages can be wired without making model calls in this slice.
LLM-judge README contracts use TBD-on-commit content hashes and require the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and respects the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule (only @tesseract/core; structural types reproduced where needed).
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps persona/runner artifacts traceable and machine-checkable while limiting scope to the declared package boundary.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 persona/pipeline/runner-cursor responsibilities and aligns with §6 persona spec format and the handbook persona-spec contract.
